actions.intent: Make one dock-safe setup clear while keeping the forecast race in view.
Start the shortest meaningful lower route.
Open the lower puppy's right side before the forecast row rises.
Break the route ice and keep the lower rescue first.
Pivot to the upper target after securing the urgent lower puppy.
Stabilize the board before the final extraction.
Finish the second rescue after proving the forecast-row race.

notes: Designer golden for the first pressure check: count accepted actions, rescue lower first before the forecast row claims the path.
